title: Feature request : a drag&drop switch on/off
author: Dustbr
body_snippet:
Hello guys,
The current product fits all my needs, I love it, great job ! 👍 

There is just a small feature that I would like to see added to mRemoNG and that is a switch to disable or enable the possibility to drag and drop the elements in the "Connections" windows.
Currently I often happen to have one of my connections or folders that moves out of my will in another place/folder in my connection tree.

I do not really know the origin of this except that it happens when I am too fast in m...

iterations.description: Valid UX enhancement — users accidentally drag connections/folders; a toggle in Settings to disable tree drag&drop prevents this

notes:
AI triage (claude): Valid UX enhancement — users accidentally drag connections/folders; a toggle in Settings to disable tree drag&drop prevents this
Approach: Add a bool setting 'DisableConnectionTreeDragDrop' (default false). In ConnectionTreeDragAndDropHandler, check the setting at the start of HandleEvent_ModelDropped and cancel if disabled. Add a checkbox to the Connections options page to toggle it.
